lines.raw: Lesson 85 | 第85课
'Paris in the Spring'. | “春天的巴黎”。

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: At what time of year did Ken visit Paris?
lines.chinese: 肯是在一年中的什么时候访问巴黎的？
lines.raw: At what time of year did Ken visit Paris? | 肯是在一年中的什么时候访问巴黎的？
Hello, Ken. | 你好，肯。
Hi, George. | 嗨，乔治。

lines.english: Have you just been to the cinema?
lines.raw: Have you just been to the cinema? | 你刚去电影院了吗？
Yes, I have. | 是的，我去了。
What's on? | 正在放映什么？
'Paris in the Spring'. | “春天的巴黎”。
Oh, I've already seen it. | 哦，我已经看过了。

lines.english: I saw it on television last year.
lines.raw: I saw it on television last year. | 我去年在电视上看过。

lines.english: It's an old film, but it's very good.
lines.chinese: 那是一部老电影，但非常好。
lines.raw: It's an old film, but it's very good. | 那是一部老电影，但非常好。

lines.chinese: 巴黎是一座美丽的城市。
lines.raw: Paris is a beautiful city. | 巴黎是一座美丽的城市。
I've never been there. | 我从未去过那里。

lines.english: Have you ever been there, Ken?
lines.raw: Have you ever been there, Ken? | 你去过那里吗，肯？
Yes, I have. | 是的，我去过。
I was there in April. | 我是四月份去的。
Paris in the spring, eh? | 春天的巴黎，是吗？

lines.english: It was spring, but the weather was awful.
lines.chinese: 那是春天，但天气很糟糕。
lines.raw: It was spring, but the weather was awful. | 那是春天，但天气很糟糕。
It rained all the time. | 一直在下雨。
Just like London! | 就像伦敦一样！
